testsuite.name: turbomq.broker.BrokerDiscoveryAcceptanceTest
testsuite.system-out: 09:05:19.355 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.375 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Self-refutation: bumped incarnation to 1 09:05:19.386 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 09:05:19.386 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 declared DEAD (suspect timeout expired)
